description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric facade. The front features a large garage door on the left, a recessed main entryway in the center, and expansive windows on the right, providing a view into a living area. The exterior is primarily white with gray accents, and the property includes a paved driveway and a green lawn. The side views reveal minimal window openings and a simple, boxy structure, emphasizing privacy and a contemporary aesthetic. The rear of the house is mostly solid, with no visible windows or doors, highlighting a focus on the front-facing design.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a garage, and a minimalist white facade with gray accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, main entryway, large windows, driveway, and lawn.
description_view_1: Right side view with minimal windows, a glimpse of interior greenery, and the edge of the lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view with a solid wall, no visible windows or doors, emphasizing privacy.
description_view_3: Left side view with a chimney, blank wall, and the edge of the driveway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entryway with a simple door, no steps, and no porch or decorative columns
